title: Boards vs Executive Committees
description: HR-analytics project comparing the composition of Boards of Directors and Executive Committees — data cleaning, exploratory analysis, and linear regression on member attributes.

title: Boardroom Diversity: Northrop Grumman vs Thales
description: Comparative diversity analysis of two aerospace & defense firms' governance bodies — exploratory analysis plus hypothesis testing (t-test, chi-square, correlation) on gender, age, education, and tenure.

title: Amazon Prime Video Dashboard
description: Interactive Tableau dashboard analyzing the Amazon Prime Video catalog — content trends, ratings, genres, and release patterns — featuring custom radial bar charts and branded design.

title: IBM HR Analytics Dashboard
description: Tableau dashboard exploring IBM HR data — employee attrition, demographics, and satisfaction drivers — to surface actionable workforce insights.

title: Bike Sales Excel Dashboard
description: Interactive Excel dashboard analyzing bike sales by demographics and purchasing behavior, with pivot tables, slicers, and charts for self-serve exploration.

title: Brazil Rent Data Analysis
description: Cleaned and modeled Brazilian rental data to predict prices. Tested Linear Regression, Random Forest, and clustering (K-Means, Hierarchical), evaluating models via MAE and R-squared for market insights.

title: Social Media Share Predictor
description: Machine learning tool to predict social media post shares. Conducted EDA, handled outliers, and engineered features, then compared Linear Regression, Random Forest, and ANNs with 10-fold cross-validation.

title: Genre-Based Music Recommendation System
description: Bachelor's thesis: built a genre-based Spotify recommender using Spotify's Web API. Leveraged users' listening history and preferences to generate personalized recommendations, with a survey to evaluate recommendation quality.

title: IBM Strategic Growth Analysis
description: Strategic management case on IBM: built a quantified 'growth corridor', conducted SWOT analysis, and modeled growth scenarios to assess strategic direction.

title: Entrepreneurship Lab — Azure Cell Therapies
description: Collaborated with biotech startup Azure Cell Therapies to develop a sustainable business model. Applied Theory of Change, Product-Market Fit, and Materiality Assessment frameworks.

title: Engaging Key Stakeholders for School Connectivity in Ethiopia
description: Global-strategy and market-research report on connecting schools to the internet in Ethiopia, developed within the Giga initiative framework — assessing feasibility, stakeholders, and impact.

title: Safely — Digital Economy & Innovation
description: Report and presentation proposing 'Safely', a digital-economy concept — covering the problem space, platform model, and innovation strategy.

title: Business Model Canvas
description: A structured Business Model Canvas mapping value proposition, customer segments, channels, revenue streams, and cost structure for a venture analysis.

title: Strategic HR Management
description: Strategic human-resource management report linking HR practices to organizational strategy and performance.

title: CISG Milk Powder Case
description: Business-law case analysis under the CISG (international sale of goods), examining contract formation, obligations, and remedies in a milk-powder dispute.

title: Portfolio Optimization & Financial Analysis
description: Finance project covering portfolio optimization (beta estimation, optimal portfolio construction) and a regression analysis of Alphabet and Netflix returns. Includes firm analysis, credit risk, and pro-forma financial statements.

title: JP Morgan Market Memorandum
description: Finance and market-research memorandum analyzing a company/market opportunity with supporting data and a clear investment narrative.

title: UNIGE Instagram Takeover
description: Ran the University of Geneva's official Instagram (@unigeneve) for a day, covering a live event through stories and posts with a student's voice — certified by UNIGE's communication service.
